metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Students explore contemporary music styles, production techniques, and performance in modern genres. This course emphasizes popular music, electronic music, music technology, and diverse contemporary styles.
metadata.general_description: A course focused on contemporary music styles, production, and performance in modern genres.

big_ideas.statement: Contemporary music encompasses diverse styles, technologies, and cultural expressions.
big_ideas.elaboration: Modern music includes popular, electronic, hip-hop, indie, experimental, and hybrid forms that reflect current cultural influences and technological possibilities.

big_ideas.statement: Music technology is an integral tool for creating, recording, and distributing contemporary music.
big_ideas.elaboration: Digital audio workstations, synthesizers, samplers, and other technologies enable new possibilities for sound creation and music production.

big_ideas.statement: Contemporary music connects to cultural identity, social movements, and personal expression.
big_ideas.elaboration: Modern music reflects diverse perspectives, cultural backgrounds, and contemporary social issues, serving as platforms for artistic and cultural expression.

big_ideas.statement: Performance and production in contemporary music styles require technical and artistic skills.
big_ideas.elaboration: Contemporary musicians develop diverse skills including instrument mastery, vocal performance, music production, and digital audio manipulation.

competencies.raw: Perform contemporary music styles with technical and artistic skill
i_can_statements: I can perform songs and pieces in contemporary styles authentically
I can develop stage presence and performance skills in modern contexts
I can execute vocal or instrumental techniques appropriate to contemporary music
I can interpret contemporary music with personal artistry

competencies.raw: Create original music using contemporary styles and approaches
i_can_statements: I can write original songs or compositions in contemporary styles
I can develop melodies, chord progressions, and lyrics
I can create music that reflects personal expression and cultural interests
I can compose complete musical pieces with coherent structure

competencies.raw: Develop music production and recording skills
i_can_statements: I can use digital audio workstations for recording and production
I can capture and edit vocal and instrumental performances
I can create beat patterns and rhythmic elements
I can mix and process audio using contemporary production techniques

competencies.raw: Explore synthesizers, samplers, and electronic instruments
i_can_statements: I can operate synthesizers and create electronic sounds
I can use sampling techniques to incorporate sounds into compositions
I can explore sound design and creation with electronic instruments
I can integrate electronic elements into my music

competencies.raw: Analyze contemporary music styles and production techniques
i_can_statements: I can identify characteristics of different contemporary music genres
I can analyze song structure, arrangement, and production elements
I can recognize production techniques and effects used in songs
I can understand how technology shapes contemporary musical sound

competencies.raw: Understand music technology and digital audio fundamentals
i_can_statements: I can explain digital audio concepts and sound properties
I can understand how technology is used in music production
I can analyze audio processing and effects
I can make informed decisions about technology choices

competencies.raw: Reflect on personal music creation and performance
i_can_statements: I can evaluate my own compositions and arrangements
I can assess my performance and production choices
I can identify areas for artistic and technical growth
I can set goals for developing as a contemporary musician

competencies.raw: Examine cultural contexts and social meanings in contemporary music
i_can_statements: I can analyze how contemporary music reflects cultural and social issues
I can understand diverse perspectives and identities in music
I can recognize representation and voice in contemporary music
I can critically engage with music's cultural significance

competencies.raw: Document music creations and production work
i_can_statements: I can record and save my musical creations
I can document my composition and arrangement process
I can organize music files and project materials
I can create clear documentation of my musical work

competencies.raw: Share music through performance and recording
i_can_statements: I can perform my music for audiences
I can share recordings of my music
I can present my work in public contexts
I can engage audiences with my musical expression

competencies.raw: Communicate about music through discussion and analysis
i_can_statements: I can discuss contemporary music and its cultural significance
I can explain my artistic choices and musical intentions
I can provide constructive feedback on peers' work
I can participate in music discussions and communities

competencies.raw: Use music as communication of ideas and emotions
i_can_statements: I can express ideas and emotions through my music
I can create music that communicates messages and meaning
I can use music to connect with and engage audiences
I can develop my voice as a musician and artist

competencies.raw: Connect contemporary music to diverse cultural traditions
i_can_statements: I can explore how contemporary music draws from diverse traditions
I can respect and authentically incorporate cultural influences
I can understand fusion and hybrid contemporary styles
I can appreciate global perspectives in contemporary music

competencies.raw: Explore emerging trends and innovative musical approaches
i_can_statements: I can stay aware of evolving contemporary music styles
I can experiment with new techniques and production methods
I can explore music at the intersection of genres and traditions
I can develop personal artistic vision in contemporary music

competencies.raw: Engage with music distribution and digital platforms
i_can_statements: I can understand music distribution and streaming platforms
I can share my music through digital channels
I can build audience presence and engagement
I can navigate music industry and career pathways

competencies.raw: Develop pathways in contemporary music and music technology
i_can_statements: I can explore music production careers and opportunities
I can develop a professional portfolio of musical work
I can network in music and audio production communities
I can create plans for continued growth in contemporary music

areas.name: Contemporary Music Styles and Genres
topics: Current music trends and emerging genres

areas.name: Contemporary Music Performance and Creation
topics: Songwriting and composition in contemporary styles
Stage performance and presence in contemporary contexts
